trends.headline: Rhode's peptide glazing serum is SkinTok's 'glazed donut' summer glow buy
trends.body: Hailey Bieber's Rhode peptide serum is surging again as creators chase the lit-from-within 'glazed' finish that reads as skin, not makeup, in summer heat. Film a 'glazed skin in 3 layers' GRWM building down to a no-foundation glow, or an honest '$30 dupe vs Rhode' side-by-side on bare skin.

metadata.context: Celebrity peptide serum trending for a dewy 'glazed' no-makeup summer glow

trends.headline: 'Weatherproof' climate-adaptive makeup is BeautyTok's heat-season test format
trends.body: Climate-adaptive beauty has gone mainstream, and creators are stress-testing sweat-proof, humidity-resistant routines in real summer conditions. Shoot an '8 hours in 90-degree heat, did my makeup survive?' wear test, or a 'weatherproof base routine for humid days' tutorial layering primer, setting spray and powder.

metadata.context: Heat-and-humidity makeup wear-tests trending as climate-adaptive beauty goes mainstream

trends.headline: Turquoise is FashionTok's defining 'it-color' for summer 2026
trends.body: Turquoise has become the season's cool-girl color, anchoring outfit content alongside shell details and statement buttons in a fresh shift away from butter yellow. Make a 'one turquoise piece, 4 outfits' styling reel or a 'how to wear turquoise without looking costumey' lookbook mixing it with denim and white linen.

metadata.context: Turquoise emerging as summer's signature color for styling content

trends.headline: The banana bread latte is FoodTok's cozy-meets-summer coffee of the moment
trends.body: Creators are cooking bananas down with sweeteners and spices, straining the result into a syrup, and building a banana bread latte that's blowing up for its homemade-syrup payoff. Shoot a slow 'making banana bread syrup from scratch' ASMR or a 'banana bread latte: cafe order vs home dupe' cost-and-taste comparison.

metadata.context: DIY banana bread syrup latte trending as a homemade coffee-shop dupe

trends.headline: 'Secret menu swirl' fast-food drinks are FoodTok's order-and-react format
trends.body: Creators are filming themselves ordering chain secret-menu drinks, aggressively swirling the cup to mix the layers, then reacting to the first sip. Make a 'ranking 5 secret-menu drinks so you don't have to' taste test or a 'recreating the viral swirl drink at home for $2' dupe.

metadata.context: Secret-menu drink ordering and cup-swirl reactions trending as a repeatable format

trends.headline: #75Soft is FitTok's sustainable, do-able alternative to 75 Hard
trends.body: The gentler #75Soft challenge has racked up tens of millions of views as a realistic summer reset, swapping rigid rules for one daily workout, mostly-clean eating and a daily water goal. Start a 'Day 1 of 75 Soft, here are my 4 rules' kickoff or a weekly 'what 75 Soft actually looks like for a busy person' check-in series.

metadata.context: Gentler 75 Soft challenge trending as a sustainable summer fitness reset

trends.headline: Thrift-flip furniture rescues are HomeTok's fastest-growing DIY format
trends.body: Furniture rescues and thrift flips are among HomeTok's fastest-growing sub-niches as the 'character over perfection' mood rewards saving a curbside find over buying new. Film a 'rescuing a $15 dresser' start-to-finish transformation or a 'thrift flip on a $30 budget' reveal with a satisfying before/after.

metadata.context: Thrift-flip and furniture-rescue transformations trending as HomeTok's top DIY content

trends.headline: The Soundcore Boom 2 is TechTok's waterproof summer-party speaker pick
trends.body: The rugged, IPX7-waterproof Soundcore Boom 2 has become a viral TechTok favorite for poolside and beach content heading into summer. Shoot a 'will it survive the pool?' waterproof torture test or a 'best budget Bluetooth speaker for summer 2026' honest review with a bass-on-the-water demo.

metadata.context: Waterproof party speaker trending in summer poolside and review content

trends.headline: The 2-in-1 stroller wagon is ParentTok's summer-outings must-buy
trends.body: Convertible stroller wagons that seat two kids with all-terrain wheels and dual canopies are trending with parents gearing up for festivals, zoos and beach days. Film a 'is the stroller wagon worth it?' honest first-summer review or a 'what fits in the wagon for a day out' pack-with-me for toddler parents.

metadata.context: Convertible 2-in-1 stroller wagon trending for summer family outings

trends.headline: Lick mats are PetTok's go-to summer boredom-buster and calm-down tool
trends.body: Lick mats and lick-bowls are surging as creators use them to slow down eating, calm anxious pets and make frozen summer treats. Shoot a 'frozen lick-mat recipe to keep your dog cool' how-to or a 'does a lick mat actually calm my anxious cat?' before/after test.

metadata.context: Lick mats trending as a summer enrichment and calming tool for dogs and cats

trends.headline: 'Things I wish I knew before visiting' is TravelTok's highest-watch advice format
trends.body: Advice-driven travel content is outperforming pure aesthetic footage, and quick-fire 'things I wish I knew before visiting ___' videos are leading on watch-through and comments. Make a 'things I wish I knew before [your city] this summer' rapid-tips reel or a 'rookie mistakes tourists make here' list locals will defend in the comments.

metadata.context: Quick-fire 'things I wish I knew' advice videos trending as TravelTok's top format

trends.headline: Beaded shell jewelry is JewelryTok's mermaidcore summer staple
trends.body: Chunky beaded jewelry and shell details are back and bigger than ever as the coastal mermaidcore aesthetic takes over summer JewelryTok. Film a 'DIY beaded shell necklace' ASMR build or a 'styling one beaded set from beach to dinner' lookbook leaning into the curated-chaos stack.

metadata.context: Beaded and shell jewelry trending with the coastal mermaidcore summer aesthetic
